SafetyAgent.name: Safety Goal
SafetyAgent.description: Safety objective for RollCall: Students must be able to view their own attendance records

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 1
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 2
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): The system must generate attendance reports for administrators and calculate attendance percentages
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 3
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): The system must support multiple classes and semesters, and maintain historical attendance data
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 4
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (hazard prevention): A roll call system must track student attendance for classes
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for hazard prevention

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 5
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): The system must allow teachers to mark students as present, absent, or late
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for fault tolerance

SafetyAgent.name: Safety Requirement 6
SafetyAgent.description: The system shall ensure safety (risk mitigation): Students must be able to view their own attendance records
SafetyAgent.measurable_criteria: Clause-level quality requirement for risk mitigation
